title: Add CallSignal variant to ClearMessage
description:
Add CallSignal + CallSignaling types to core/src/messages.rs.

What: Extend ClearMessage enum with a CallSignal variant carrying WebRTC SDP/ICE signaling. Relay stays blind — these messages travel inside MLS-encrypted payloads.

Algorithm:
1. Add to ClearMessage enum in messages.rs:
   CallSignal { call_id: Uuid, signal: CallSignaling }
2. Add new enum CallSignaling (serde tag=kind, snake_case):
   - Offer { sdp: String } — caller→callee
   - Answer { sdp: String } — callee→caller
   - IceCandidate { sdp_mid: Option<String>, sdp_m_line_index: Option<u32>, candidate: String }
   - Hangup { reason: Option<String> }
   - Reject { reason: Option<String> }
3. Add round-trip tests with known JSON test vectors (see acceptance criteria).

Defensive rules: sdp strings are untrusted inputs on receive (malformed SDP must not panic); call_id must be fresh Uuid per session (not reused); relay never deserializes this.

Tests (with external oracle):
- offer_roundtrip: ClearMessage::CallSignal { call_id: known_uuid, signal: CallSignaling::Offer { sdp: known_sdp }} → serialize → deserialize → must match. Oracle: manually construct expected JSON string.
- ice_candidate_roundtrip: same approach with IceCandidate.
- hangup_roundtrip: Hangup variant.
- unknown_variant_rejected: add type=call_signal_bad → serde_json must return Err.

Acceptance: cargo test -p agora-core; all ClearMessage tests pass including new ones.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p agora-core::messages passes; no new warnings
close_reason: CallSignal + CallSignaling added to ClearMessage; 3 round-trip tests pass; 96/96 core tests
